self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: R1 Seasoned Symphony: when the equipping character is off-field, ATK is increased by an additional 12%.
R1 Seasoned Symphony: after initiating healing, the equipping and healed character(s) gain Sweet Echoes: ATK +32% for 3s.

team_conditional_modifiers_json.description: R1 Seasoned Symphony: after initiating healing, the equipping and healed character(s) gain Sweet Echoes: ATK +32% for 3s.
